major_mechanics.name: Pillar Breaks
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each damage cycle when Adina becomes invulnerable.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Adina retreats to the center and protective pillars rise around the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Break the correct pillars in the assigned order to expose Adina again.
major_mechanics.failure: Breaking the wrong pillar or failing to break pillars in time causes arena-wide damage and resets the phase.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players attacking the wrong pillar; poor split assignments; ignoring add pressure during breaks.

major_mechanics.name: Sand Walls
major_mechanics.when: Triggered during each major attack cycle and during transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Large walls of sand rising from the ground and sweeping across the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move to safe zones or rotate around the arena to avoid being trapped or damaged.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit by sand walls deals heavy damage and can trap players in lethal zones.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players rotating too slowly; running into walls; splitting from the group.

major_mechanics.name: Hand Crush
major_mechanics.watch_for: Giant stone hands emerging from the ground beneath players.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move out of the telegraphed zones immediately to avoid being grabbed.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit results in massive damage and immobilization.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing still too long; dodging into another hand zone.

major_mechanics.name: Electric Storm
major_mechanics.when: Occurs at fixed intervals throughout the fight.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Sabir channels energy and a large storm aura forms around him.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Stack tightly inside the safe zone and use defensive cooldowns to survive the blast.
major_mechanics.failure: Being outside the stack zone results in instant death.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing too far away; dodging out of the stack; late stacking.

major_mechanics.name: Tornado Pushes
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the fight, especially during storm phases.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Tornadoes forming around the arena and drifting toward players.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Avoid tornado paths and reposition quickly if pushed.
major_mechanics.failure: Being pushed into storms or off the platform results in death.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing near tornado spawn points; ignoring tornado movement patterns.

major_mechanics.name: Jade Explosions
major_mechanics.when: Triggered during add phases and storm transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Jade orbs glowing brightly before detonating.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move away from or destroy jade orbs before they explode.
major_mechanics.failure: Explosions deal heavy AoE damage and can chain into lethal hits.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players ignoring orb timers; stacking too close to multiple orbs.

major_mechanics.name: Pylon Attunement
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each pylon phase as players attune to beams.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Beams connecting pylons to Qadim and attunement icons appearing on players.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Stand in the correct beam to maintain attunement and control pylon energy flow.
major_mechanics.failure: Losing attunement causes beams to destabilize and increases arena pressure.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing in the wrong beam; leaving beams unattended; poor rotation timing.

major_mechanics.name: Anomalies
major_mechanics.when: Spawn during each pylon phase and during transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Small glowing anomalies drifting toward pylons or Qadim.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Kill anomalies quickly before they reach their targets.
major_mechanics.failure: Anomalies empower Qadim or destabilize pylons, causing massive damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling the boss; ignoring anomaly spawns; poor add focus.

major_mechanics.name: Unstable Magic
major_mechanics.when: Occurs throughout the fight, especially during burn phases.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Magic eruptions forming on the ground with bright telegraphs.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move out of marked zones immediately to avoid heavy damage.
major_mechanics.failure: Standing in eruptions deals lethal damage and can chain into group wipes.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players stacking too tightly; dodging into other eruptions; ignoring telegraphs.

major_mechanics.name: Tail Swipes
major_mechanics.when: Triggered when players stand behind Qadim for too long.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Qadim shifting his weight and sweeping his tail behind him.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Avoid standing directly behind Qadim; reposition to his sides.
major_mechanics.failure: Tail swipes deal heavy damage and knock players away.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling DPS behind the boss; ignoring tail animations.
